content: agent2: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' - modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py to support note/created/modified metadata params. Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py.

My edits are done and committed to working tree (not git-committed) in src/jinja2/ext.py: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS module constant, metadata dict parsing in parse() (checks token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the 'assign' branch, raises TemplateAssertionError for missing assignment or non-string-literal value, stores into metadata dict, continue), added 'metadata' param to _make_node() signature (appended at the end) and sets output_node.trans_metadata = metadata if non-empty before returning. Also changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for the comma-expectation check in the param loop. Go ahead and layer your domain= changes on top - please re-add your domain param to _make_node()'s signature/call site alongside mine rather than reverting my metadata param. Ping me if you want to review the diff first.
